name: Low Carb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175°C). Coat muffin cups with a little vegetable oil, or use butter, margarine, or pan spray.
2. Carefully separate the eggs, ensuring no egg yolk mixes with the whites.
3. Beat the egg whites until frothy using an electric mixer. Add the cream of tartar and continue beating just until stiff peaks form.
4. Combine egg yolks, cottage cheese, soy flour, and sweetener in a bowl.
5. Gently fold this mixture into the beaten egg whites.
6. Fill each muffin cup 2/3 full with batter.
7. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until golden brown and spring back when touched.
Variation: For spice muffins, stir 1/2 tsp cinnamon, 1/4 tsp ground ginger, and 1/8 tsp cloves into the soy flour before adding to the egg yolks.
